prompt: Run the repository-native Clean Architecture invariant, report its exact result, and make no product change when the current tree already satisfies it.

commands.observation: The checker printed Architecture boundary check passed under Node 22.22.3 and pnpm 10.30.1, with the repository engine mismatch warning retained.

cause_effect: The task used the target package script, so no V1 install, update, audit, scaffold, status, or version core command occurred.
The current layer imports satisfied the invariant, so the correct smallest change set was empty.
No durable plan was created for P2; only the card-required result evidence was recorded.
